import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { ArrowRight, Award, Building2, Users, Clock, Shield, CheckCircle, Star } from 'lucide-react'; const Home = () => { const features = [ { icon: Shield, title: 'RERA Verified', desc: 'All properties RERA certified' }, { icon: CheckCircle, title: 'Legal Documentation', desc: '100% transparent paperwork' }, { icon: Users, title: 'Expert Team', desc: 'Dedicated real estate professionals' }, { icon: Award, title: 'Trusted Brand', desc: '14+ years of excellence' }, ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}
Welcome to Swabhagya Realty

Building Trust,
Building Nashik

Premium residential and commercial properties in the heart of Nashik. Experience luxury living with complete transparency.

{/* Stats Section */}
{[ { number: '61+', label: 'Happy Customers' }, { number: '14+', label: 'Years Experience' }, { number: '50+', label: 'Projects Completed' }, { number: '100%', label: 'Legal Documentation' } ].map((stat, idx) => (
{stat.number}
{stat.label}
 ))}
{/* Why Choose Us */}

Why Choose Us

Experience the difference with Nashik's most trusted real estate partner

{features.map((feature, idx) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.desc}

 ))}
{/* Featured Properties */}

Featured Properties

Discover our most premium properties in Nashik

{[ { title: 'Sunrise Heights', type: 'Residential', price: '₹45 Lakhs', location: 'Panchavati, Nashik', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560448204-e02f11c3d0e2?w=800', beds: '2/3 BHK', area: '1200 sq.ft' }, { title: 'Business Plaza', type: 'Commercial', price: '₹1.5 Cr', location: 'CBD, Nashik', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497366216548-37526070297c?w=800', beds: 'Retail Space', area: '1000 sq.ft' }, { title: 'Green Valley Villas', type: 'Luxury Villas', price: '₹1.2 Cr', location: 'College Road, Nashik', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560185127-6ed189bf02f4?w=800', beds: '4 BHK', area: '2500 sq.ft' } ].map((property, idx) => (
{property.type}

{property.title}

{property.location}

{property.price}
🛏️ {property.beds} 📐 {property.area}
))}
); }; export default Home;
